/usr/bin/c++  -march=native "CMakeFiles/tinylang-tblgen.dir/TableGen.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tinylang-tblgen.dir/TokenEmitter.cpp.o" -o tinylang-tblgen  /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMTableGen.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinfo.so /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
